required_writes.description: SYSRANGE_START (0x00) write to trigger a measurement. Common values are 0x01 (start single-shot) or 0x02 (back-to-back continuous). Without any write to 0x00, the sensor never measures.
Range-result read: register pointer 0x14 for the 12-byte result block, or 0x1E/0x1F for the 16-bit range directly.
